editorial_thesis: The strongest fresh signal is operational: make agent work measurable, constrain it at trust boundaries, and give humans inspectable handoff surfaces rather than more autonomous surface area.

topic_groups.title: Agent Controls + Measurement
topic_groups.selection_rationale: GitHub shipped a coherent July 17 control-plane update: review instruction changes can be tested in a PR, network and runners can be scoped per workload, and adoption is measurable by repository. This is a material update beyond the July 15–17 governance coverage.

sources.title: Copilot code review: customization and configurability improvements
sources.why_selected: It separates review setup, runner choice, and network access from the cloud agent, while reading instructions from the PR head branch.
sources.usefulness: Pilot agent review policy as reviewable repository code rather than an organization-wide black box.

sources.title: Repository-level GitHub Copilot usage metrics generally available
sources.why_selected: The metrics API now reports coding-agent PRs and code-review activity for each repository and day.
sources.usefulness: Build a weekly adoption and review-quality dashboard by client or repository.

sources.title: GitHub Copilot app now available in the usage metrics API
sources.why_selected: App sessions, prompts, requests, and token consumption are now observable separately in 1-day and 28-day reports.
sources.usefulness: Distinguish browser/app experimentation from actual engineering workflow adoption.

sources.title: GitHub Mobile: Fix pull request comments with Copilot cloud agent
sources.why_selected: Review comments can now become cloud-agent fix tasks from the mobile PR surface.
sources.usefulness: Keep a human review gate while allowing a low-friction remediation handoff.

topic_groups.title: Trust Boundaries + Response
topic_groups.selection_rationale: A July 17 emergency WAF rule and fresh agent-security research make a practical, under-covered case for treating provenance, permission, and abstention as deploy-time controls—not prompt wording.

sources.title: Cloudflare emergency WAF release
sources.why_selected: New managed rules block active exploitation of unauthenticated RCE and SQL injection patterns in popular web frameworks.
sources.usefulness: Confirm managed rules are enabled, then test application behavior before an incident forces the change.

sources.title: n8n 2.30.7 stable
sources.why_selected: The stable release adds provenance-attested source linting for community packages and fixes SES signing.
sources.usefulness: Use provenance checks as a baseline for client automations that install community nodes.

sources.title: How Agents Ask for Permission
sources.why_selected: It maps permissions from user interface through policy derivation to runtime enforcement across 21 proposals.
sources.usefulness: Turn vague approval prompts into scoped, user-level capability policies.

sources.title: AgentAbstain: Do LLM Agents Know When Not to Act?
sources.why_selected: Across paired safe/unsafe tasks, the best tested agent reached only 59.5% paired accuracy.
sources.usefulness: Add explicit stop-and-escalate tests before allowing agents to make irreversible changes.

sources.title: Agent Data Injection Attacks are Realistic Threats to AI Agents
sources.why_selected: It shows trusted-looking metadata and tool-context data can bypass instruction-focused defenses.
sources.usefulness: Preserve provenance and isolate untrusted inputs in browser, code, and workflow agents.

topic_groups.title: Operator Feedback Surfaces
topic_groups.selection_rationale: This under-covered lane favors reviewable interfaces around automation: native Slack feedback, inspectable email outputs, and upgrades that strengthen observability and browser containment. All selected signals have fresh July 15–17 updates.

sources.title: Chat SDK adds native Slack agent support
sources.why_selected: The Slack adapter adds agent threads, suggested prompts, streaming status, and native feedback controls.
sources.usefulness: Prototype a client-facing or internal concierge with an explicit feedback loop rather than a generic bot.

sources.title: Cloudflare Email Service: sent-message preview
sources.why_selected: The activity log can now show rendered HTML, text, headers, attachments, and raw sent mail, retained about seven days.
sources.usefulness: Debug automated client email as an observable artifact, not an opaque delivery event.

sources.title: Arize Phoenix v19.0.0
sources.why_selected: The observability stack adds OAuth2 and CLI login while deliberately tightening unattended API-key issuance.
sources.usefulness: Upgrade trace infrastructure with a migration plan for service-key provisioning.

sources.title: agent-browser v0.32.2
sources.why_selected: The release follows new domain-allowlist hardening and state-persistence work with compatibility updates for the Eve extension.
sources.usefulness: Use a browser-agent stack that treats domain confinement and recoverable state as first-class controls.
